hero.title: Work Log Tracker
hero.description: Record timed or manual work, organize it by project, and review private activity summaries without surveillance.

differences.title: A work record, not a monitoring system
differences.description: Keep useful professional context without device surveillance or payroll complexity.

items.title: Organize context
items.description: Store project, code, client label, and billable default.

items.title: Capture outcomes
items.description: Record duration, accomplishments, blockers, and notes.

items.title: Understand time
items.description: Filter history and review accurate summaries.

feel.title: Fast, private, and practical
feel.description: Responsive records keep time and outcomes easy to revisit.

items.title: Flexible
items.description: Switch safely between timed and manual modes.

items.title: Accurate
items.description: Breaks, overnight work, and overlaps follow explicit rules.

items.title: Focused
items.description: No payroll, invoicing, surveillance, integrations, or AI claims.

audiences.title: Who uses Work Log Tracker
audiences.description: For people who need a trustworthy activity history.

items.title: Freelancers and consultants
items.description: Separate billable and non-billable effort without invoicing.

items.title: Work logs
items.description: Timed or manual durable activity records.

items.title: Summaries
items.description: Today, week, month, status, and billing-state metrics.

items.name: Time
items.description: Use clock intervals or reported minutes.

items.name: Filters
items.description: Combine project, status, mode, billable state, period, and dates.

items.name: Detail
items.description: Open durable records directly and safely.

technicalSection.title: Private and owner scoped
technicalSection.description: An isolated database and protected APIs keep each user’s history separate.
items: Manual entries may overlap; active timed entries may not.
Referenced projects are deactivated instead of destroying history.
Billable means a time classification only, never a monetary calculation.
